overall.description: Atmospheric horror game footage featuring a slow cinematic orbit around a moss-covered wooden house in a dense foggy forest. The scene maintains a consistent eerie atmosphere with low visibility and desaturated colors typical of survival horror games.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned wooden house front exterior in foggy forest

agents.ego_description: slowly circling the house from the front, observing the porch and upper windows through the fog

entered.detail: two-story weathered wooden house with heavy moss and ivy covering the roof and walls
leafless twisted tree branches silhouetted against the fog
covered front porch with wooden support beams and sloped roof
stone chimney stack visible above the roofline
warm yellow light glowing faintly from a window or door on the right side of the porch

segments.scene_description: The camera slowly orbits the front of a moss-covered wooden house in dense fog. The porch and dormer windows are visible, with a faint warm light glowing from the right side. Bare tree branches loom on the left while the stone chimney rises above the roofline.

scene_state.functional_zone: house side exterior transitioning from front to left flank

events.description: the warm porch light disappears from view as camera moves past the front corner

agents.ego_description: continuing the slow orbit around the left side of the house, revealing the side wall structure

entered.detail: ground-floor windows on the side of the house with dark frames
stone base or foundation visible at the bottom of the wooden walls

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its slow leftward orbit, the porch and its warm light pass out of view behind the house corner. The side wall with its windows and stone foundation comes into view, while the bare trees on the left grow larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: left side of house close to wall and corner

agents.ego_description: moving along the left side wall, observing the weathered wood and moss details up close

entered.detail: small dormer window on the side roof slope
corner post and edge where front and side walls meet

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the left side of the house, showing the weathered wooden siding and side dormer window in detail. The corner pillar of the house is prominent in the foreground while the stone chimney moves out of view behind the roof.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, continuous orbit around a weathered wooden house, shifting from a view of the glowing front porch to the desolate side of the structure. It begins by gliding past the front of the moss-covered home, where a faint warm light emanates from the right and bare tree branches loom against a dense fog. As the camera continues its leftward arc, the porch and its light vanish behind the corner of the building, bringing the stone foundation and side windows into focus while the surrounding trees grow larger in the frame. The scene then shifts to a detailed view of the weathered wooden siding and a side dormer window, with the corner pillar becoming prominent in the foreground. Finally, the camera moves further along the left wall as the stone chimney disappears behind the roofline into the gray mist.
